description: Sudden pipe burst in upstairs bathroom caused water damage to kitchen ceiling and flooring.
Heavy rain caused surface water to enter the home through the front door.
Windstorm damaged roof shingles on residential property.
Insured vehicle was damaged in a rear-end collision.
Vehicle sustained hail dents during a severe storm.
Engine failure caused by mechanical breakdown.
Hail damaged roof of commercial retail building.
Flood water entered warehouse after nearby creek overflowed.
Small electrical fire damaged office storage area.
Retail store reported theft of business equipment after overnight break-in.
Business operations suspended for three days after covered fire damage to store area.
Damage resulted from long-term deterioration of business property flooring.
